title: Hollow Pack
description: My project is a texture pack that utilizes a palette of 4 colors from Hollow. It focuses on creating a unique visual style through a minimalistic color scheme.
body: My texture pack, which uses a palette of 4 colors from Hollow, is designed to create a distinct visual style with a minimalistic approach. For the best experience, it is highly recommended to use the Insanity Shader alongside this pack. The shader enhances the colors and adds depth to the textures, resulting in a more immersive and visually striking environment.
